It operates as a Provider of farm data management software solutions Traction has raised $20M in funding [Cooperative Ventures](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/cooperativeventures/__srks_VoX498nCaRAw_ULU4F4FSGdpvsp5OCZZnKvDrA). The company has 1227 active competitors, including 119 funded and 52 that have exited . Its top competitor include companies like [CropX](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/cropx/__qRZh6M6FlTXsVJbjVI44wj3PGRAcdRua73jwUjn9gYs), [xFarm](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/xfarm/__yXCyrSgeZEZNfxIL2IVNQi3xaogXoK0hPOST4REU9Fw) and [Semios](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/semios/__cHGPcLYILOJyTFdNE68FROaFT-kWmcvNewaLdsUj5q0). ### Company Details Provider of farm data management software solutions. It has developed cloud-based accounting and payroll software. It also offers data integration, minimizes data entry, helps evaluate farms' profitability for lease negotiations, and helps make year-end tax planning decisions. It enables farmers to understand the actual profit and track net worth. It operates as a Provider of e-commerce solutions for businesses Traction Apps has raised $6M in funding [Ventures Platform](https://tracxn.com/d/venture-capital/venturesplatform/__CrNUH00FJbtV1ZvulJkp1gWbgrBxXyB880HgP0eGUdc). The company has 1990 active competitors, including 200 funded and 161 that have exited . Its top competitor include companies like [Shopify](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/shopify/__NNWgXlWtRBr7FVe-BI1BiwMHs246IPF8HlqlcE5kZno), [ShopUp](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/shopup/___qBxZ5XnRfgeh2CLPNeO9Oh5GE7LL8t8nLKoGrwVng0) and [Pattern Com](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/patterncom/__eHEH4va0YuCHmcKYVb8NYyIs6R7aAVyAMaTG__3_QYw). ### Company Details Provider of e-commerce solutions for businesses. Its solution offerings include payments management, inventory management, customer management, online storefront design, development, analytics, reporting, back-office business operations, invoicing, and more. Its mobile application is available on Android and iOS platforms. The company also offers retail solutions for offline businesses. SpaceX has fundamentally reshaped the global space industry with its relentless pace of innovation. Founded by Elon Musk in 2002, its audacious goal was to reduce space access costs and make humanity multi-planetary. The company has evolved from a startup into a dominant, vertically integrated force. ![Image 2: What is Competitive Landscape of SpaceX Company?](https://portersfiveforce.com/cdn/shop/articles/download_18b5c12e-f434-4168-b29f-e3b925a9db64_800x.png?v=1755882746)\n...\nTitle: What is Competitive Landscape of SpaceX Company? URL Source: https://portersfiveforce.com/blogs/competitors/spacex Published Time: 2026-01-18 11:57:45 +0100 Markdown Content: ### SpaceX Bundle ![Image 1: Get Bundle](https://portersfiveforce.com/cdn/shop/files/GENERAL-FBT-Icon-1.png) Get Full Bundle: [5 FORCES](https://portersfiveforce.com/products/spacex-five-forces-analysis)~~$15~~$10 [BCG](https://portersfiveforce.com/products/spacex-bcg-matrix)~~$15~~$10 [CANVAS](https://portersfiveforce.com/products/spacex-business-model-canvas)~~$15~~$10 [4P's MIX](https://portersfiveforce.com/products/spacex-marketing-mix)~~$15~~$10 [PESTLE](https://portersfiveforce.com/products/spacex-pestle-analysis)~~$15~~$10 [SWOT](https://portersfiveforce.com/products/spacex-swot-analysis)~~$15~~$10 ## Who challenges SpaceX? SpaceX has fundamentally reshaped the global space industry with its relentless pace of innovation. Founded by Elon Musk in 2002, its audacious goal was to reduce space access costs and make humanity multi-planetary. The company has evolved from a startup into a dominant, vertically integrated force. ![Image 2: What is Competitive Landscape of SpaceX Company?](https://portersfiveforce.com/cdn/shop/articles/download_18b5c12e-f434-4168-b29f-e3b925a9db64_800x.png?v=1755882746) This analysis details SpaceX's market dominance, profiles key rivals, and examines its formidable competitive advantages. Understanding this landscape is crucial, as explored further in our SpaceX Porter's Five Forces Analysis.\n...\nTitle: What is Competitive Landscape of SpaceX Company? Any unauthorized duplication, redistribution or disclosure of this report will result in prosecutio", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "On seed-stage startup traction (and why to ignore it) | by Jared Heyman | Medium", "url": "https://jaredheyman.medium.com/on-seed-stage-startup-traction-and-why-to-ignore-it-9ad662981145", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] February 7, 2025 -This is because product ideas can and often do pivot over time, markets rapidly evolve, traction can wane, competitors come and go\u2026 but the founders are usually a constant and have a huge impact on the fate of an early-stage startup. However, many seed-stage investors prefer to focus on the more easily quantifiable aspects of a startup when making their investment decisions, like revenue traction or monthly growth rate, probably because it feels more comfortable to base a high-stakes investment decision on something \u2018hard\u2019 like numbers vs something \u2018soft\u2019 like team quality.", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "Traction: How Any Startup Can Achieve Explosive Customer Growth: Amazon.co.uk: Weinberg, Gabriel, Mares, Justin: 9781591848363: Books", "url": "https://www.amazon.co.uk/Traction-Startup-Achieve-Explosive-Customer/dp/1591848369", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] Traction will teach you the nineteen channels you can use to build a customer base, and how to pick the right ones for your business. It draws on inter-views with more than forty successful founders, including Jimmy Wales (Wikipedia), Alexis Ohanian (reddit), Paul English (Kayak), and Dharmesh Shah (HubSpot). Youll learn, for example, how to: \u00b7Find and use offline ads and other channels your competitors probably arent using \u00b7Get targeted media coverage that will help you reach more customers \u00b7Boost the effectiveness of your email marketing campaigns by automating staggered sets of prompts and updates \u00b7Improve your search engine rankings and advertising through online tools and research Weinberg and Mares know that theres no one-size-fits-all solution; every startup faces unique challenges and will benefit from a blend of these nineteen traction channels.", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "Is Space Investable? - Colossus", "url": "https://joincolossus.com/article/is-space-investable/", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] November 19, 2025 -Figure 2 The estimated cost to SpaceX for a Falcon 9 is nearly a factor of five lower than if the same rocket had been developed and operated under a traditional public/private arrangement, principally due to rocket reuse, more efficient R&D, greater ecosystem control, and lower dependence on external vendors. Source: Positive Sum analysis. Images: [22], [23], [24]. SpaceX\u2019s success has spawned a number of commercial competitors seeking to capture their own slices of the growing launch market.", "relevance_score": 0.6}]
